mapper.select: SELECT CONFIG_VALUE FROM TB_SYS_CONFIG WHERE CONFIG_KEY = #{configKey} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
SELECT CONFIG_KEY , F_COM_DECRYPT(CONFIG_VALUE, #{encryptKey}) AS CONFIG_VALUE , CONFIG_DESC , SORT_ORDER , USE_YN FROM TB_SYS_CONFIG WHERE CONFIG_KEY = #{configKey} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
SELECT CONFIG_KEY , CONFIG_VALUE , CONFIG_DESC , SORT_ORDER , USE_YN FROM TB_SYS_CONFIG WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY SORT_ORDER ASC
mapper.update: INSERT INTO TB_SYS_CONFIG (CONFIG_KEY, CONFIG_VALUE, CONFIG_DESC, CRE_USR_CD, CRE_DTM, UPD_DTM, DEL_YN) VALUES (#{configKey}, #{configValue}, #{configDesc}, #{ssnUsrCd}, NOW(), NOW(), 'N') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE CONFIG_VALUE = #{configValue}, UPD_USR_CD = #{ssnUsrCd}, UPD_DTM = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_SYS_CONFIG WHERE CONFIG_KEY = #{configKey} AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND CONFIG_VALUE = F_COM_ENCRYPT(TRIM(#{accessCode}), #{encryptKey}) AND DEL_YN = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_SYS_CONFIG WHERE CONFIG_KEY = #{configKey} AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND CONFIG_VALUE IS NOT NULL AND CONFIG_VALUE != '' AND DEL_YN = 'N'
